code: import axios from"axios";const BASE=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||"http://localhost:5000";const api=axios.create({baseURL:BASE});api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem("nw_token");if(token)config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);return config;});api.interceptors.response.use(res=>res,err=>{var _err$response;if(((_err$response=err.response)===null||_err$response===void 0?void 0:_err$response.status)===401){localStorage.removeItem("nw_token");localStorage.removeItem("nw_user");window.location.href="/login";}return Promise.reject(err);});export default api;
